primary.justification: The chapter's entire architecture is built around discovering India's topographical diversity — every named section (Himalayas, Ladakh, Gangetic Plains, Thar Desert, Aravallis, Peninsular Plateau, Coastlines, Islands, Sundarbans, NE Hills) is a distinct geographical feature of India's landmass. Remove this competency and the chapter has no organising purpose.

Livelihood–landform correlations recur substantively across multiple named sections: the Thar Desert section explicitly describes how people have adapted food, clothing, and lifestyle to desert conditions; the Gangetic Plains section explains how fertile soil enables dense agriculture and large population; the Peninsular Plateau section names tribal communities with lifestyles connected to forest and nature. The chapter's organising logic — describe each landform then describe what life and ecology it enables — makes the continuity of this competency evident across sections.

The chapter contains named passages explaining river flow from Himalayan snowmelt (Himalayas as Water Tower) and the tilt of the Peninsular Plateau determining river flow direction — both are natural phenomena requiring explanation. These are subordinate to the landform characterisation purpose but constitute at least one named element requiring explanation of a natural phenomenon.

The Aravallis section explicitly names mineral resources (marble, granite, zinc, copper); the Peninsular Plateau section notes coal, forests, and minerals; the Gangetic Plains describes agricultural fertility. These are scattered within landform sections rather than a dedicated resource-distribution study, qualifying as present but not substantive.

The Himalayas section discusses the Great Himalayan National Park (UNESCO), community-government joint conservation, and kath-kuni sustainable architecture. The Thar Desert section discusses taanka/kund rainwater harvesting as traditional conservation. The Sundarbans is noted as a UNESCO Heritage Site. These are named structural elements present within sections, qualifying as weight 1.
